Description: Code representing the second-tier subcategory of the event; must be decoded via overlay
Third-level event topic/category code (integer), for further sub-classification, must decode
Binary indicator (1/0) for whether the event/news was featured on Reuters front page
Event importance level code: High, Medium, Low relevance to market (must decode)
Code representing the main category of the event; must be decoded via overlay (e.g. M&A, regulatory, etc.)
